nasb.text: For You have maintained my just cause; You have sat on the throne judging righteously.

esv.text: For you have maintained my just cause; you have sat on the throne, giving righteous judgment.

cnv.text: 因為你為我伸了冤，辨了屈； 你坐在寶座上，施行公義的審判。

ccb.text: 你坐在宝座上按公义审判， 你为我主持公道。

csbs.text: 因你为我施行公正、执行判决； 你坐在宝座上施行公义的审判。
